description: English query with mixed language documents

input.user_prompt: What is the time complexity of quicksort and how does it compare to mergesort?

documents.content: Quicksort has average time complexity O(n log n) but worst case O(n^2). It uses divide-and-conquer with a pivot element.
Mergesort guarantees O(n log n) in all cases but requires O(n) extra space for merging.
HTTP协议是互联网通信的基础协议，定义了客户端和服务器之间的请求响应格式
快速排序和归并排序都是分治算法，但它们的空间复杂度和稳定性不同
